programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: An actual witch (Nicole Kidman) and a neurotic movie star (Will Ferrell) land the lead roles in a television remake of the 1960s sitcom. Starring Nicole Kidman, Will Ferrell, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby: Unrated
programme.desc: NASCAR driver Ricky Bobby faces his greatest challenge ever when French Formula One driver Jean Girard roars onto the scene. Starring Will Ferrell, John C. Reilly, Sacha Baron Cohen.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Kanan returns to Queens where Raq tries to mend the many fractures in the Thomas family; as Raq expands her empire, Kanan doubts his future in the drug game; Detective Howard gets released from the hospital.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq learns she may have a snitch and tasks Marvin with confirming the rumor; Lou brings in a potential new artist, but he and Crown disagree; Kanan helps Famous sell mix tapes; Jukebox tracks down her estranged mother.

programme.title: Blood Quantum
programme.desc: The dead are coming back to life and almost all of Earth's population is decimated due to a zombie virus, except for the isolated Mi'kmaq reserve of Red Crow, whose indigenous inhabitants are strangely immune to the zombie plague. Starring Michael Greyeyes, Elle-Maija Tailfeathers, Forrest Goodluck.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: An ex-con and reformed sociopath battles a band of heavily armed mercenaries as he tries to uncover the truth behind his brother's mysterious death. Starring Scott Eastwood, Mel Gibson, Tyrese Gibson.

programme.title: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood. Starring Jay Baruchel, Scott Speedman, Emily Hampshire.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Ranna tries to fulfill the laws that keep Praxis protected; Magnus figures out how the tremors and power fluctuations can be controlled.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Helen returns to find that the sanctuary has been trashed and members of the team have been attacking one another.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Three flightless birds (Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Danny McBride) investigate the mysterious arrival of green pigs to their island paradise. Starring Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Danny McBride.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them. Starring Hank Azaria, Neil Patrick Harris, Jayma Mays.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel. Starring Neil Patrick Harris, Brendan Gleeson, Jayma Mays.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Though it is forbidden, a man devises a way to reunite with a long-lost love from the twin world that sits just above his own. Starring Kirsten Dunst, Jim Sturgess, Timothy Spall.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: An upper-class lawyer (Daniel Day-Lewis) falls in love with his fiancée's (Winona Ryder) freethinking cousin (Michelle Pfeiffer) in the 1870s New York. Starring Daniel Day-Lewis, Michelle Pfeiffer, Winona Ryder.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: In 1953 a professor (Julia Roberts) of art history challenges her female students (Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles) to re-examine the traditional roles of women. Starring Julia Roberts, Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers and falls in love with a struggling, but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him. Starring Bradley Cooper, Lady Gaga, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: A surprise encounter with Howard leaves Kanan speechless; Raquel tries to settle in new territory, but while investigating a missing business associate with her money, she meets an old adversary.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Kanan and Jukebox search for answers in family matters; when Raq's push into new territory stalls, she proposes a meeting; Crown helps Famous get settled; Still investigating Howard's shooting, Burke questions Unique.

programme.title: Nurse.Fighter.Boy
programme.desc: An urban love story tells of the heart of a fighter. Starring Clark Johnson, Karen LeBlanc, Daniel J. Gordon.

programme.title: Easy Land
programme.desc: A mentally ill Serbian architect tries to build a better future for her daughter in Canada. Starring Mirjana Jokovic, Nina Kiri, Daniel Kash.

programme.title: Rebelle
programme.desc: African rebels force a village girl (Rachel Mwanza) to kill her own parents and join their army, but a miraculous event makes the rebels think she has supernatural powers. Starring Rachel Mwanza, Alain Bastien, Serge Kanyinda.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Looking to share a quiet evening out with Abby, Will and his date are abducted en route to the restaurant by a gang leader who faces certain death without their help; upon learning the abductor's identity, Magnus ceases all attempts at rescue.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr Helen Magnus, a 158-year-old English scientist, seeks out extraordinarily-powered creatures, known as Abnormals.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Members of the mysterious and spooky Addams Family -- Gomez, Morticia, Pugsley, Wednesday, Uncle Fester and Grandma -- encounter a shady TV personality who despises their eerie hilltop mansion. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: The Addams Family 2
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer as a family, Gomez, Morticia and the rest of the Addams clan embark on an adventurous road trip in a hideous and humongous camper. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: Watermark
programme.desc: This documentary brings together diverse stories from around the globe and explores our relationship with water and how it shapes humanity. Starring Edward Burtynsky.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry. Starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: During World War II, a group of art scholars and other experts infiltrates enemy territory to retrieve stolen masterpieces before the Nazis destroy them. Starring George Clooney, Matt Damon, Bill Murray.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's acclaimed account of an English boy's life in a WWII internment camp in Japanese-occupied China. Starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich, Miranda Richardson.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Boy
programme.desc: When Scott and Teresa learn their son, Austin, is autistic and has brittle bone disease, they worry about his future. However, with Scott's growing faith and Austin's incredible spirit, they find joy, gratitude and courage in the most trying times. Starring Zachary Levi, Meghann Fahy, Patricia Heaton.

programme.title: Armageddon Time
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about the strength of family and the generational pursuit of the American dream. Starring Anne Hathaway, Jeremy Strong, Michael Banks Repeta.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq focuses on mother-son bonding with Kanan in the Catskills, but they get interrupted when business follows them; Crown disrespects Lou, bringing their simmering beef to a boil; Burke digs into Howard's personal life.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq assures everyone they need to follow orders and keep working as planned; Kanan takes on more responsibility, but things go wrong when he runs into neighborhood kids; Lou feels the pressure in his partnership with Crown.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: A man (James Spader) and wife who get thrills from car accidents hook up with the head (Elias Koteas) of a group that stages famous wrecks. Starring James Spader, Holly Hunter, Elias Koteas.

programme.title: The F Word
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend. Starring Daniel Radcliffe, Zoe Kazan, Megan Park.

programme.title: Born to Be Blue
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, jazz trumpeter Chet Baker (Ethan Hawke) begins a romance with an actress (Carmen Ejogo) while trying to stage a musical comeback. Starring Ethan Hawke, Carmen Ejogo, Callum Keith Rennie.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henry's double date goes awry when Magnus insists they do a routine delivery of an Abnormal en route.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Tesla investigate a former Praxian stronghold and realize they may have stumbled upon secrets to the Vampiris race.

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee
programme.desc: Akeelah, an 11-year-old girl living in South Los Angeles, discovers she has a talent for spelling, which she hopes will take her to the National Spelling Bee. Starring Laurence Fishburne, Angela Bassett, Keke Palmer.

programme.title: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Sent to bed without supper, a mischievous boy enters a land that grows out of his imagination and becomes king of the fantastic creatures who live there. Starring Catherine Keener, Max Records, Mark Ruffalo.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An image consultant transforms a tomboyish FBI agent into a beauty queen so she can work undercover to catch a terrorist. Starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt.

programme.title: Cooking With Stella
programme.desc: A woman cooks for clients and tries to keep her thefts of food and money from being discovered. Starring Don McKellar, Seema Biswas, Lisa Ray.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the town's full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract. Starring Brendan Gleeson, Taylor Kitsch, Liane Balaban.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Louisa May Alcott's classic story of the lives, loves and triumphs of four sisters in Civil War-era New England. Starring Winona Ryder, Gabriel Byrne, Trini Alvarado.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: An English commoner (Heath Ledger) dons the armor of a dead jouster and, with the help of friends (Mark Addy, Paul Bettany, Alan Tudyk), competes against nobles in 14th-century France. Starring Heath Ledger, Mark Addy, Rufus Sewell.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Jumping back in time, Gia struggles to write her book about sex in America; embarking on a love story of her own, Gia processes the pain of her own losses; she moves to Indiana and bonds with Lina.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Lina, Sloane, and Maggie connect with their hearts' desire, unaware of the fallout that awaits them.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father. Starring Ana de Armas, Keanu Reeves, Ian McShane.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs. Starring Jake Gyllenhaal, Mélanie Laurent, Isabella Rossellini.

programme.title: Being Canadian
programme.desc: Rob Cohen tries to find out what it really means to be Canadian.

programme.title: Bring Your Smile Along
programme.desc: A New England teacher (Constance Towers) goes to New York and helps a pop composer (Keefe Brasselle) write a singer's (Frankie Laine) hits. Starring Frankie Laine, Constance Towers, Keefe Brasselle.

programme.title: Record of a Tenement Gentleman
programme.desc: A widow (Choko Iida) in postwar Japan begrudgingly adopts an abandoned boy (Hohi Aoki) whom she grows to love. Starring Choko Iida, Hohi Aoki, Shohichi Kawamura.

programme.title: A Hen in the Wind
programme.desc: A soldier returns home at the end of World War II, and refuses to forgive his wife for prostituting herself one night to pay off medical bills for their son during the heights of the war. Starring Kinuyo Tanaka, Shûji Sano, Chieko Murata.

programme.title: Flavor of Green Tea Over Rice
programme.desc: In the 1950s, married life had become dull for Japanese couple Mokichi and Taeko. Their niece is determined to escape their fate and refuses to accept an arranged marriage. With tentative steps, this family slowly moves into the modern age. Starring Shin Saburi, Michiyo Kogure, Kôji Tsuruta.

programme.title: Early Spring
programme.desc: A young married man and his wife deal with a passionless relationship while he has an extramarital affair. Starring Haruko Sugimura, Chishu Ryu, Teiji Takahashi.

programme.title: Tokyo Twilight
programme.desc: Two sisters move home in trouble where they learn their mother is not dead. Starring Ineko Arima, Kamatari Fujiwara, Setsuko Hara.

programme.title: They Live by Night
programme.desc: Fugitive lovers Keechie (Cathy O'Donnell) and Bowie (Farley Granger) are doomed by fate from the start. Starring Cathy O'Donnell, Farley Granger, Howard Da Silva.

programme.title: A Woman's Secret
programme.desc: A piano player (Melvyn Douglas) tells a detective about two singers (Maureen O'Hara, Gloria Grahame), one supposedly shot by the other. Starring Maureen O'Hara, Melvyn Douglas, Gloria Grahame.

programme.title: Born to Be Bad
programme.desc: A woman (Joan Fontaine) milks an affair with a writer (Robert Ryan) and marriage to a rich businessman (Zachary Scott). Starring Joan Fontaine, Robert Ryan, Zachary Scott.

programme.title: Flying Leathernecks
programme.desc: Marine pilots in the World War II Pacific gain respect for a squadron major (John Wayne) who never lets up. Starring John Wayne, Robert Ryan, Janis Carter.

programme.title: On Dangerous Ground
programme.desc: A New York detective (Robert Ryan) falls for the blind sister (Ida Lupino) of a rural killer sought by a victim's father (Ward Bond). Starring Ida Lupino, Robert Ryan, Ward Bond.

programme.title: Party Girl
programme.desc: A gangster's (Lee J. Cobb) lawyer (Robert Taylor) turns against him for a nightclub dancer (Cyd Charisse) in Roaring '20s Chicago. Starring Robert Taylor, Cyd Charisse, Lee J. Cobb.

programme.title: 55 Days at Peking
programme.desc: Soldiers from 11 countries and a Marine major (Charlton Heston) guard a besieged compound during the Boxer Rebellion. Starring Charlton Heston, Ava Gardner, David Niven.

programme.title: The Beast of the City
programme.desc: A police chief (Walter Huston) fighting crime and corruption is betrayed by his brother (Wallace Ford) who falls for a gun moll (Jean Harlow). Starring Walter Huston, Jean Harlow, Wallace Ford.

programme.title: Frances
programme.desc: Actress Frances Farmer (Jessica Lange) makes trouble in 1930s and '40s Hollywood; her mother (Kim Stanley) commits her to a barbaric asylum. Starring Jessica Lange, Kim Stanley, Sam Shepard.

programme.title: Gable and Lombard
programme.desc: Stars Clark Gable (James Brolin) and Carole Lombard (Jill Clayburgh) fall in love and marry in the 1930s Hollywood. Starring James Brolin, Jill Clayburgh, Allen Garfield.

programme.title: W.C. Fields and Me
programme.desc: The Hollywood comedian's (Rod Steiger) story is told as recalled by Carlotta Monti (Valerie Perrine), his longtime mistress. Starring Rod Steiger, Valerie Perrine, John Marley.

programme.title: The Story of Will Rogers
programme.desc: The homespun humorist and social critic (Will Rogers Jr.) starts as a cowboy and goes on to vaudeville, movies, radio. Starring Will Rogers Jr., Jane Wyman.

programme.title: One Way Passage
programme.desc: A condemned man (William Powell) and dying woman (Kay Francis) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring William Powell, Kay Francis, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Two Heads on a Pillow
programme.desc: Newlyweds (Neil Hamilton, Miriam Jordan) break up, then meet again as opposing lawyers on an annulment case. Starring Neil Hamilton, Miriam Jordan, Henry Armetta.

programme.title: Three Came Home
programme.desc: A U.S. writer (Claudette Colbert) and her British husband (Patric Knowles) endure a Japanese colonel's (Sessue Hayakawa) prison camp. Starring Claudette Colbert, Patric Knowles, Sessue Hayakawa.

programme.title: The Four Feathers
programme.desc: An English officer (John Clements) fights in the Sudan after receiving white feathers of cowardice from friends. Starring John Clements, Ralph Richardson, C. Aubrey Smith.

programme.title: Five and Ten
programme.desc: A dime-store heiress (Marion Davies) rejects a New Yorker (Leslie Howard), then destroys his marriage. Starring Marion Davies, Leslie Howard, Irene Rich.

programme.title: 6 Day Bike Rider
programme.desc: A small-town clerk (Joe E. Brown) impresses his girlfriend (Maxine Doyle) by entering a big-city bicycle race. Starring Joe E. Brown, Maxine Doyle, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Seven Brides for Seven Brothers
programme.desc: When an Oregon trapper decides to marry, his six rowdy brothers aim to follow suit, though not one has a sweetheart yet. Starring Howard Keel, Jane Powell, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: Millionaire Playboy
programme.desc: A psychiatrist takes a young man to a resort where he hopes a bevy of beauties can cure his patient of hiccuping. Starring Joe Penner, Linda Hayes, Russ Brown.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: A British POW colonel (Alec Guinness) orders his men to build their Japanese captor (Sessue Hayakawa) a railway bridge in the jungle. Starring William Holden, Alec Guinness, Sessue Hayakawa.

programme.title: Uptown Saturday Night
programme.desc: Blue-collar buddies (Sidney Poitier, Bill Cosby) search the underworld for a winning lottery ticket lost in a nightclub holdup. Starring Sidney Poitier, Bill Cosby, Harry Belafonte.

programme.title: No Time for Sergeants
programme.desc: A Georgia rube (Andy Griffith) joins the peacetime Air Force and talks back to his sergeant (Myron McCormick). Starring Andy Griffith, Myron McCormick, Nick Adams.

programme.title: The Incredible Mr. Limpet
programme.desc: A Brooklyn bookkeeper (Don Knotts) falls off a pier, turns into a fish and helps the Navy track U-boats. Starring Don Knotts, Carole Cook, Jack Weston.

programme.title: Body and Soul
programme.desc: A gospel preacher (Paul Robeson) sinks in sin and corruption. Starring Paul Robeson, Julia Theresa Russell, Marshall Rogers.

programme.title: Flesh and the Devil
programme.desc: A wicked woman (Greta Garbo) dishonors her husband and divides two Austrian officers (John Gilbert, Lars Hanson). Starring Greta Garbo, John Gilbert, Lars Hanson.

programme.title: The Cat and the Fiddle
programme.desc: A New York soprano (Jeanette MacDonald) meets a struggling composer (Ramon Novarro) in Brussels and saves his operetta on opening night. Starring Ramon Novarro, Jeanette MacDonald, Frank Morgan.

programme.title: To Have and Have Not
programme.desc: A boat skipper (Humphrey Bogart) flirts with a singer (Lauren Bacall) and fools Nazis on the island of Martinique. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Lauren Bacall, Walter Brennan.

programme.title: Night and Day
programme.desc: Ivy League songwriter Cole Porter (Cary Grant) joins World War I, marries a rich British nurse (Alexis Smith) and returns to Broadway. Starring Cary Grant, Alexis Smith, Ginny Simms.

programme.title: Tea and Sympathy
programme.desc: Marked as a sissy, a preppie turns to his housemaster's understanding wife. Starring Deborah Kerr, John Kerr, Leif Erickson.

programme.title: The Flame and the Arrow

programme.desc: A ruthless political struggle between Sweden and Denmark turns bloody under the tyranny of the mad King Christian II. Caught up in this deadly war, two sisters seek revenge on the men who brutally murdered their family. Starring Sophie Cookson, Claes Bang, Alba August.

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Throwing Robin off the trail, Harry convinces her that he now knows she was right, seeing Dillon was all in his head.

programme.title: Mass
programme.desc: Two couples meet for a painful and raw conversation in the aftermath of a violent tragedy. Starring Reed Birney, Ann Dowd, Jason Isaacs.

programme.title: American Underdog
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Starring Zachary Levi, Anna Paquin, Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police brings in Sergeant Jeffrey Pelo for questioning after being identified prowling outside a young woman's house in the middle of the night; adamant he's done nothing wrong, interrogators walk a tight rope questioning one of their own.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A confession to a lesser crime is still a false confession; when Nick Nehring admits to gunning down a man, claims of self-defense set him up for a shorter sentence; getting the true story could mean the difference of year.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Keith is known as a quiet but highly skilled artisan who takes good care of his mother, but after she becomes mysteriously ill, and he is not heard from for three weeks, his girlfriend Betty comes under suspicion.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Near Gunnison, Colo., Jake Millison goes missing; the outcome seems grim as the months wear on, but a break in the case unravels the mystery behind his disappearance, revealing a greed-fueled plot far more sinister than anyone can imagine.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A beloved teacher is brutally murdered in her own home just days before Christmas, leaving a community in shock; for 25 years, the case remains unsolved, until an unexpected break in DNA technology reveals a connection no one sees coming.

programme.title: My Sister's Double Life
programme.desc: When Chelsea's sister vanishes after a late-night shift at a diner, she tries to convince the police that she's been abducted. Racing against the clock, she soon discovers that her sister's captor is now after her as well. Starring Sarah Grey, Amalia Williamson, Cody Ray Thompson.

programme.title: My Mother Stole My Life
programme.desc: A woman steals her estranged daughter's identity to escape from an abusive boyfriend. However, when he tracks her down, she finds herself in even more danger. Starring Patrice Goodman, Blaise Crocker, JaNae Armogan.

programme.title: Don't Open the Door
programme.desc: A man discovers the body of a woman inside a suitcase; despite the killer's grisly attempt to obscure her identity, detectives identify the victim as 28-year-old swimsuit model Jasmine Fiore.

programme.title: Barons
programme.desc: Mac turns up in Woogonga and calls in a debt that Snapper can't pay; Trotter races to win back Tracy and LightWave; Buddy and Hunter finally have to face the truth about their future together.

programme.title: Troppo
programme.desc: A shocking revelation of an affair leads Amanda and Ted to focus their attention on Yoon Sun and Olivia as prime suspects; Ted is confronted to discover his past is still very much in the present.

programme.title: A Husband to Die For: The Lisa Aguilar Story
programme.desc: Attacked and left for dead, a pregnant woman starts to suspect that her own husband may be the culprit. With help from family and a determined legal team, she embarks on a courageous journey to protect her child, seek justice, and rebuild her life. Starring Keana Lyn, Jon McLaren, Marilu Henner.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: After a series of security lapses, Wells Fargo had over $7 Million stolen in one night in a heist dubbed White Eagle; bizarrely, it was pulled of by a revolutionary guerrilla group from Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: Shawnie meets Ron online and the romance develops over a shared love of athletics; Shawnie moves to the mountains to be with Ron, but when his erratic behavior turns from manipulative to criminal, she must confront Ron's secret life.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A savvy poker player cleans up at the tables once at sea, but when she witnesses a man overboard, many begin to wonder if it was accidental or on purpose.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A farmer and his wife take a cruise celebrating their hard work and good fortune, but their luck changes drastically and the friends who are on board celebrating with them now aid in the search for the farmer who is now missing at sea.

programme.title: Chosen Family
programme.desc: Yoga teacher Ann cannot escape her manic family and miserable dating life. Things start looking up, however, when her friends set her up with a divorced dad who has an adorable 7-year-old daughter. Starring Heather Graham, John Brotherton, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: God's Creatures
programme.desc: A mother tells a lie for her beloved son that rips apart their family and close-knit Irish town -- ultimately testing her own sense of right and wrong. Starring Emily Watson, Paul Mescal, Aisling Franciosi.

programme.desc: Eve sees a strange woman watching her and her husband from outside their home. As the stranger slowly intrudes further into their lives, Eve begins to question if she's losing her mind or her husband's loyalty. Starring Tom Felton, Amanda Crew, Ashley Greene.

programme.title: Barefoot in the Park (1967)

programme.title: Hour of the Gun (1967)

programme.sub-title: Children of the Corn II: The Final Sacrifice (1992)

programme.title: Hoosiers (1986)

programme.title: The Doors (1991)
programme.desc: UCLA film student Jim Morrison (Val Kilmer) finds a girlfriend (Meg Ryan), forms a band and turns tragic 1960s rock star.

programme.title: Almost Famous (2000)
programme.desc: An aspiring teenage rock journalist gets his big break when he follows an up-and-coming band on its tour.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: A hip Chicago teen (Kevin Bacon) moves to a Midwestern town where, thanks to a pastor (John Lithgow), dancing is outlawed.

programme.title: Flashdance (1983)

programme.desc: Students (Asher Book, Kristy Flores, Paul Iacono) at New York's High School of Performing Arts see if they have the dedication and talent necessary to achieve their dreams.

programme.title: Showgirls (1995)

programme.desc: The man in black (Yul Brynner) forms a new Magnificent Seven, to save Mexican farmers from slave labor.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff! (1969)

programme.title: Lifeguard (1976)
programme.desc: A 30-ish beach bum (Sam Elliott) feels like a failure after seeing his old girlfriend (Anne Archer) at a high-school reunion.

programme.title: Soapdish (1991)
programme.desc: The star (Sally Field) of a soap opera is rattled by her ex-lover's (Kevin Kline) return to the daytime drama The Sun Also Sets.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: A hip Chicago teen (Kevin Bacon) moves to a Midwestern town where, thanks to a pastor (John Lithgow), dancing is outlawed.

programme.title: Fame (2009)
programme.desc: Students (Asher Book, Kristy Flores, Paul Iacono) at New York's High School of Performing Arts see if they have the dedication and talent necessary to achieve their dreams.

programme.title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)
programme.sub-title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)

programme.title: In the Line of Fire (1993)
programme.desc: An assassin toys with a White House Secret Service agent haunted for 30 years by his failure in 1963 Dallas.

programme.title: From
programme.sub-title: What a Long Strange Trip It's Been
programme.desc: Boyd and Jade set off on a desperate, mind-bending search for answers, while a food run to the settlement takes a chilling turn.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code (2006)
programme.desc: A murder in the Louvre Museum and clues in paintings by Leonardo da Vinci lead to the discovery of a religious mystery that could rock the foundations of Christianity.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: In an insurance scam, a man fakes his death and sets his wife up to take the blame. After serving 10 years in prison, she sets out to get revenge, immune from the law since she cannot be re-prosecuted for the same crime.

programme.title: Below (2002)
programme.desc: Mysterious events occur aboard a submarine after its crew (Matthew Davis, Bruce Greenwood) rescues three survivors from a sunken ship during World War II.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder (1965)
programme.desc: Four sons learn their father gambled away the family ranch, leading to his murder. The brothers decide to avenge their father's death and win back the ranch, starting a feud with the local sheriff and the rival Hastings clan.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard (1950)
programme.desc: Hack screenwriter Joe Gillis moves in with Hollywood has-been Norma Desmond and her devoted chauffeur, Max Von Mayerling.

programme.title: Invaders From Mars (1986)
programme.desc: A boy sees his parents and neighbors act like zombies after a flying saucer lands in his backyard.

programme.title: Ironweed (1987)
programme.desc: The award-winning novel is the basis for this account of a few days in the life of a Depression-era drifter.

programme.title: Much Ado About Nothing (1993)
programme.desc: Shakespeare's Don Pedro (Denzel Washington) pairs Benedick (Kenneth Branagh) and Beatrice (Emma Thompson) and woos Hero for Claudio around a lively Italian villa.

programme.title: Children of a Lesser God (1986)
programme.desc: Starting his new job as an instructor at a New England school for the deaf, James Leeds meets Sarah Norman, a young deaf woman who works at the school as a member of the custodial staff.

programme.title: West Side Story (1961)
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of vicious gang warfare between the New Yorker Jets and the Puerto Rican Sharks, a romance develops across rival lines. 1960s update of "Romeo and Juliet", with amazing song and dance sequences.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility (1995)
programme.desc: Suitors romance, then abandon, sisters (Emma Thompson, Kate Winslet) left destitute by their father's death in late-1800s England.

programme.title: Forrest Gump (1994)
programme.desc: JFK, LBJ, Vietnam, Watergate and other history unfold through the perspective of an Alabama man (Tom Hanks) with an IQ of 75.

programme.title: The Crying Game (1992)
programme.desc: An IRA underling (Stephen Rea) meets the lover of a British soldier (Forest Whitaker) he has been ordered to execute.

programme.title: Wildcat (2025)
programme.desc: An ex-black ops team reunites to pull off a desperate heist and save an eight-year-old girl's life.

programme.title: Little Big Man (1970)
programme.desc: A 121-year-old white survivor (Dustin Hoffman) of the Battle of the Little Bighorn recalls his checkered life with Cheyenne, Wild Bill Hickok. Medicine shows and more.

programme.title: From
programme.sub-title: What a Long Strange Trip It's Been
programme.desc: Boyd and Jade set off on a desperate, mind-bending search for answers, while a food run to the settlement takes a chilling turn.

programme.title: The Mechanic (1972)

programme.title: Days of Heaven (1978)

programme.sub-title: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow (2004)

programme.title: September 5 (2024)

programme.title: Blow Out (1981)
programme.desc: A sound man (John Travolta) re-creates a political murder-by-car-crash with a sight-and-sound montage.

programme.sub-title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance (1962)

programme.title: Undisputed (2002)

programme.title: Most Wanted (2020)
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: Memories of Murder (2003)
programme.desc: An urban detective (Kim Sang-kyung) and two rural policemen (Song Kang-ho, Kim Roi-ha) investigate a series of brutal killings in a small town.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths (2012)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter (Colin Farrell) finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends (Christopher Walken, Sam Rockwell) abduct a mobster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Mob Town (2019)
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: 2 Days in the Valley (1996)
programme.desc: A hit man (Danny Aiello) falls for an art dealer's helper (Glenne Headly) amid confusion in the San Fernando Valley.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Shaolin Soccer (2001)
programme.desc: A soccer coach persuades a kung-fu master and his former classmates to form a team and play for $1 million.

programme.title: Wolves (2016)
programme.desc: A talented high school basketball player's (Taylor John Smith) dreams of playing college ball are jeopardized by his hard-drinking father's (Michael Shannon) compulsive gambling.

programme.title: Pariah: The Lives and Deaths of Sonny Liston (2019)
programme.sub-title: Pariah: The Lives and Deaths of Sonny Liston (2019)
programme.desc: The life and suspicious death of boxer Sonny Liston.

programme.title: S.O.G.: The Book of Ward (2023)
programme.desc: Andre Ward, facing an all-too familiar series of obstacles, defies the odds and silences his critics with an undefeated boxing career, but walks away after choosing his role as a father and a husband over boxing.

programme.title: Eric Clapton: Life in 12 Bars (2017)
programme.desc: Eric Clapton is widely renowned as one of the greatest performers of all time. His isolated pursuit of his craft, and fear of selling out, served as a catalyst for his evolution as an artist.

programme.title: The Tuxedo (2002)
programme.desc: A chauffeur (Jackie Chan) embarks on a covert mission after a tuxedo from a secret agent (Jason Isaacs) gives him extraordinary abilities.

programme.title: The Contractor (2022)
programme.desc: When his new assignment goes awry, an elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Snake Eyes (1998)
programme.desc: A corrupt detective (Nicolas Cage) and his Navy friend (Gary Sinise) probe a U.S. official's assassination at an Atlantic City boxing match.

programme.title: Pootie Tang (2001)
programme.desc: Although he speaks an indecipherable language, a superhero (Lance Crouther) protects children from a mogul (Jennifer Coolidge) who encourages smoking, drinking and eating fast food.

programme.title: The Dictator (2012)
programme.desc: A North African tyrant (Sacha Baron Cohen) risks his life to ensure that democracy never comes to the country he so lovingly oppresses.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: The Spy Who Sexed Me (2017)
programme.desc: A beautiful woman finds passion and intrigue.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Ride (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to raise money for his daughter's cancer treatment, a retired bull rider teams up with his estranged son to orchestrate a robbery. However, they must soon outwit the local police if they want to keep the cash and their freedom.

programme.title: Into the Wild (2007)
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity (2007)
programme.desc: A young couple (Katie Featherston, Micah Sloat) move into their first new home but are disturbed by what appears to be a supernatural presence that is most active at night.

programme.title: The Infernal Machine (2022)
programme.desc: Reclusive and controversial author Bruce Cogburn is drawn out of hiding when he begins to receive endless letters from an obsessive fan. What ensues is a dangerous labyrinth as Bruce searches for the person behind the cryptic messages.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.desc: An outlaw (Henry Fonda) working for a railroad magnate fights a stranger (Charles Bronson) for a New Orleans widow's (Claudia Cardinale) land.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill (1987)
programme.desc: An account of the 101st Airborne Division's 10-day struggle to secure a strategic mountainside in South Vietnam.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan (1998)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: The Hurricane (1999)
programme.desc: Aided by a Brooklyn teen (Vicellous Reon Shannon) and three Canadians, boxer Rubin Carter (Denzel Washington) fights to be exonerated after long imprisonment for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A New York lawyer (Michael Douglas) with a wife (Anne Archer) and daughter sleeps with a client (Glenn Close) whose lust turns to hate.

programme.title: Star Trek: Section 31 (2025)
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou faces the sins of her past after joining a secret division of Starfleet that's tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Urban Cowboy (1980)
programme.desc: A Texas farmer (John Travolta) moves to the city, immerses himself in honky-tonk and falls for a sexy cowgirl (Debra Winger).

programme.title: Stop-Loss (2008)
programme.desc: A soldier (Ryan Phillippe) whose tour of duty has ended takes matters into his own hands when the Army tries to force him back into active duty in Iraq.

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder (1991)
programme.desc: Two Navy pilots (Willem Dafoe, Brad Johnson) hatch a rogue mission to bomb Hanoi with a special low-altitude plane.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victim's daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: A Mighty Heart (2007)
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie) begins a terrifying search for her husband, journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman), after he is kidnapped by terrorists in 2002 Pakistan.

programme.title: The Peacemaker (1997)
programme.desc: A scientist (Nicole Kidman) and an Army Special Forces colonel (George Clooney) travel the globe in pursuit of stolen nuclear weapons.

programme.title: The General's Daughter (1999)
programme.desc: Two investigators (John Travolta, Madeleine Stowe) find an underworld of sex and cover-ups behind an Army captain's murder.

programme.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe (2016)
programme.desc: When father and son coroners investigate the death of a beautiful "Jane Doe," they find increasingly bizarre clues.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: Sheryl (2022)
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Sheryl Crow rises to superstardom and finds a way to turn even her darkest experiences into captivating, timeless work -- creating a legacy that continues to inspire and influence generations.

programme.title: Wishful Thinking (1996)
programme.desc: A young woman (Drew Barrymore) falls for her best friend (James LeGros) while he looks for the man his girlfriend (Jennifer Beals) is having an affair with.

programme.title: The Sense of an Ending (2017)
programme.desc: A business owner (Jim Broadbent) reunites with his first love (Charlotte Rampling) after a letter and a diary force him to confront the past.

programme.title: Backcountry (2014)
programme.desc: A couple (Missy Peregrym, Jeff Roop) on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.

programme.title: Parallel (2024)
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
programme.desc: Iris (Brittany Snow) and seven other desperate people become trapped in Shepard's (Jeffrey Combs) mansion. Shepard forces them to play a sadistic game for a large sum of money -- but the dilemmas become increasingly deadly.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isn't hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Muriel's Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: Doin' It (2024)
programme.desc: Moonlighting as a high-school substitute teacher, a 30-year-old virgin gets in over her head when she's assigned to teach sex education.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: The Sense of an Ending (2017)
programme.desc: A business owner (Jim Broadbent) reunites with his first love (Charlotte Rampling) after a letter and a diary force him to confront the past.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: The Faculty (1998)
programme.desc: A group of small town High School students, including an introverted photographer and a drug dealer, begin to suspect something's off with their teachers. They realize that the faculty is under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites.

programme.title: Certain Women (2016)
programme.desc: Three strong-willed women (Kristen Stewart, Laura Dern, Michelle Williams) strive to forge their own paths amidst the wide-open plains of the American Northwest.

programme.title: The Best of Me (2014)
programme.desc: The funeral of a close friend reunites former high-school sweethearts, who find that they are still in love after 20 years apart.

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan (2010)
programme.desc: A single woman (Jennifer Lopez) meets the man (Alex O'Loughlin) of her dreams on the same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In the 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that she's an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Heartburn (1986)
programme.desc: Rachel Samstat, a New York food critic, beds Mark Forman, a Washington, D.C., newspaper columnist. The two fall in love, and Rachel relinquishes her job and relocates to be with a man who views himself as unfit for marriage.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Clouds of Sils Maria (2014)
programme.desc: A veteran actress (Juliette Binoche) comes face-to-face with an uncomfortable reflection of herself when she agrees to take part in a revival of the play that launched her career 20 years earlier.

programme.title: Outside Providence (1999)
programme.desc: After a young man (Shawn Hatosy) crashes into a police cruiser, his father sends him to boarding school where he struggles to be accepted.

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: A German couple lose their son in WWII, prompting them to become secretly anti-Nazi.

programme.title: Bride and Prejudice (2004)
programme.desc: Mrs Bakshi is looking for suitable husbands for her daughters. When the rich single gents Balraj and Darcy visit, the Bakshis have high hopes, but circumstances get in the way of romance.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby (2004)
programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Unhook the Stars (1996)
programme.desc: A suburban widow (Gena Rowlands) fights with a daughter, befriends an abused neighbor's (Marisa Tomei) son and gains a trucker's (Gérard Depardieu) infatuation.

programme.title: Failure to Launch (2006)
programme.desc: The parents of a young man (Matthew McConaughey) who still lives at home hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to finally leave the nest.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renée Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).
